evals.prompt: Our B2B SaaS company has 40% churn among customers in the 11-50 employee segment but only 8% churn in the 51-200 segment. We don't know why. Use structured analysis to help us diagnose the root cause and recommend actions.
evals.expected_output: A structured McKinsey-style problem breakdown with hypothesis trees, analysis approach, and recommendations
expectations: Output frames the problem using a structured approach (issue tree, MECE breakdown, or hypothesis tree)
Output generates at least 4-5 specific hypotheses for the churn differential
Output recommends specific analyses to test each hypothesis
Output prioritizes the most likely root causes with reasoning
Output provides initial recommendations even before full analysis

evals.prompt: Our CEO needs a board-ready recommendation on whether to expand to Europe in 2026. We're a $20M ARR US-based vertical SaaS company serving healthcare HR teams. We have 3 enterprise customers in the UK who came inbound. Help me structure the strategic analysis and recommendation.
evals.expected_output: A structured strategic analysis framework for the Europe expansion decision with clear recommendation logic
expectations: Output uses a structured framework (MECE, strategy pyramid, or similar)
Output identifies the key questions to answer (market size, go-to-market, regulatory, economics)
Output highlights the 3 UK inbound customers as a critical data point to investigate
Output addresses regulatory considerations specific to healthcare in Europe
Output provides a recommendation structure that leads to a clear Yes/No/Conditional answer
